name: ngs-alignment
description: NGS alignment and post-alignment operators for BWA, Bowtie2, STAR, HISAT2, and standalone samtools utilities.

interface.shortDescription: BWA, Bowtie2, STAR, HISAT2, and samtools utilities
interface.longDescription: Bundles atomic Bioinformatics > NGS alignment operators for building genome indexes and mapping FASTQ reads with BWA, Bowtie2, STAR, and HISAT2, plus a standalone samtools utility operator for post-alignment SAM/BAM/CRAM operations. Alignment operators keep their own samtools dependency for fused align-sort-index pipelines; the standalone samtools operator is for separate non-alignment work.
defaultPrompt: Use Alignment to index a reference genome, align FASTQ reads with BWA, Bowtie2, STAR, or HISAT2, or run standalone samtools post-alignment utilities.
